title: College Football Recruiting vs. Wins Analyzer
description: Statistical modeling project using 14 years of recruiting and game data across 255 FBS programs. Pulled data via cfbd API, trained logistic regression models with scikit-learn, and built an interactive Streamlit dashboard. Validated predictions against Vegas spreads.
status: AUC 0.70, 64.2% accuracy — validated against Vegas spreads

title: Housing Prices Data Analysis
description: Data engineering and analysis of 50,000+ housing records using Pandas, including automated data-cleaning pipelines. Published findings as an interactive HTML dashboard on GitHub. End-to-end workflow from raw data to insight.

title: Football Player Stats Database
description: Built a C program managing offensive and defensive player databases with position-specific stat tracking and automatic calculation of derived metrics including passer rating, completion percentage, and yards per carry.
